## Source Change

What changed in upstream BOTSv1 source files?

## Impacted Lane(s)

- [ ] sysmon
- [ ] winevent
- [ ] iis

## Required Action

- [ ] update downloader mapping
- [ ] update ETL mapper
- [ ] update replay manifest
- [ ] update runbook/doc

## Validation Plan

How will we verify the change end-to-end?
